GenAiPlugin.description: Conducts a comprehensive shelf audit by analyzing a shelf photo using Einstein Vision. Automatically checks planogram compliance, identifies missing SKUs, detects competitor products, creates follow-up tasks, and generates a replenishment order if needed.

pluginFunctions.description: Analyzes a shelf image and returns a complete audit report with compliance score, missing SKUs, competitor intelligence, and recommended actions.

parameters.description: The Salesforce ID of the Visit record for this store visit
The Salesforce ID of the RetailStore record
The URL of the shelf photo captured by the field rep
The aisle or shelf section being audited (e.g. Snacks Aisle 5)
